# Icp Ore

**Summary**: An analytical technique used to determine the concentration of metal ions in a liquid sample.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-pratama|PRATAMA, 2023]] used ICP-OES to track Ca2+ and Mg2+ concentrations to quantify mineral dissolution rates.

## Key Results and Findings

- The presence of Ca2+, particularly at lower pH, strongly suggested an active dissolution process. ([[2023-pratama|PRATAMA, 2023, p. 113]])
